description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this derby shoe makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. This pair comes with a shoe bag and a plastic shoe horn Upper Full leather upper with a supple leather inner lining for breathable all-day comfort Leather toe box for durability and style Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with stacked heel and textured grooves for grip and ergonomic comfort Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
